Reliable Electrical Services in Dallas

Serving DFW homes with expert electrical solutions since 2012. Trusted by thousands for safe, efficient, and lasting repairs.

Family Owned & Operated Industry Certified 16+ Years of Experience 5.0 Rating

Verified Reviews

Get a Free Estimate

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
M
Martha R.

When our Lakewood bungalow’s bathroom outlet started smoking during a storm, Apex had a technician here in 45 minutes. He found corroded wiring from a 1950s DIY job and replaced it with waterproof GFCI outlets—even sealed the exterior penetration where moisture was getting in.

J
James T.

Our 1978 Richardson home kept tripping breakers every summer. Apex upgraded us to 200-amp service and added surge protection. When the next big storm hit, our neighbors lost power for hours while our lights stayed on. Worth every penny.

L
Lisa M.

They installed 5 Hunter fans in our new Preston Hollow build—the one in the game room is huge but doesn’t wobble at all. The electrician took time to explain the different speed settings and even programmed the remotes to match our existing smart home system.

C
Carlos S.

Apex transformed our dark Oak Lawn backyard into an evening oasis. The path lights have survived two Texas hailstorms intact, and the motion-activated floods make my wife feel safer when she comes home late from her hospital shifts.

Additional Electrical Services

Apex Electrical — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every electrical project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Apex Electrical Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific electrical needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Dallas & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Dallas, TX and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Fort Worth Plano Frisco McKinney Arlington Dallas Richardson Garland
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our electrical services.

What constitutes an electrical emergency?

Any situation risking fire or shock—sparking outlets, burning smells, or complete loss of power in Dallas’ summer heat require immediate attention.

Do you service older homes with knob-and-tube wiring?

Yes, we safely update antique systems in areas like Winnetka Heights, often adding GFCI protection without compromising historic charm.

Built on Dallas Values

Call 555-ELE-R92 for immediate service across Dallas-Fort Worth.

Let's Begin →
